You don't need
another AI tool.
You need a strategy.

I've built AI at Microsoft and Intel. Now I help companies figure out what to actually do with it. No hype. No 6-month engagements. Just a clear plan.

Book a 30-minute call →

Here's the thing.

Most companies are throwing money at AI tools without knowing why. They buy the platform. They hire the team. Then they sit there wondering why nothing's changing.

I've been on the inside. I was CTO at Microsoft, then Intel. I've seen what works and what doesn't. The difference between companies that get value from AI and companies that don't? It's not the tools. It's the strategy.

I work with leadership teams to cut through the noise. We figure out where AI actually moves the needle for your business. Then we build a plan you can execute in 90 days.

Microsoft CTO, AI Division
Intel CTO, Data Center Group
Top 50 Black Business Women

What I do

AI Strategy Sprint

Two weeks. We assess where you are, find the highest-ROI opportunities, and build a 12-month roadmap. You get a board-ready deck and a plan you can start executing Monday.

$25,000

Digital Transformation

End-to-end transformation for companies ready to rebuild how they work. I stay with you through implementation, not just the planning.

$75,000+

Executive Coaching

For leaders who need to understand AI well enough to make decisions, not code it. Monthly 1:1s. Ask me anything.

$5,000/month

Let's talk.

30 minutes. No pitch. Just me understanding what you're trying to solve.
